mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and lower equity discount rates, directly increasing S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show no positive correlation with rate cuts over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate exceeding 5.0% signals deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced consumer spending power, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances when UNRATE crosses above 5.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates broad-based domestic demand growth, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 60-day returns with a Rank IC > 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in the index of industrial production reflects weakening manufacturing output and supply-side contraction, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns remain positive in > 55% of months following an INDPRO decline.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation above a 0.4% monthly threshold forces expectations of tighter monetary policy, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are not significantly negative when CPIAUCSL MoM exceeds 0.4% over a 24-month sample.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with a falling unemployment rate confirms robust labor market tightening, boosting corporate earnings expectations and yielding positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal of rising PAYEMS and falling UNRATE shows a Rank IC below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real gross domestic product reflects expanding economic activity and corporate revenue fundamentals, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth rates show zero predictive power for 20-day SPX direction with a t-statistic below 1.5 over 5 years.

mechanism_narrative: An industrial production index reading above its 12-month trend signals accelerating manufacturing capacity utilization, triggering short-term positive S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in > 50% of periods when INDPRO crosses above its 12-month average.
